---
title: "Week 8: Data Joins and Factors"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: packages-setup

library(tidyverse)
```


::: columns
::: {.column width="48%"}
#### 📖 Readings: 60 min

#### 🏋🏾‍♂️ Activities: 0 min

:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
#### 📽 Videos: 0 min 

#### 💻 Tutorials: 0 min
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------




## Data Joins

::: callout
## Learning Objectives

+ Use data joins to assemble data from multiple relational tables into a single table.

:::

### 📖 Required Reading: [R4DS 19.1-19.4: Joins](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/joins.html)

- Note: don't read 19.5! We will not cover non-equi joins in this course

By the end of the reading, you should be able to answer the following questions:

::: {.callout-check-in}

TO-DO

:::

## Factor Variables

::: callout
## Learning Objectives
+ Reorder and relabel factor variables in data cleaning steps and data visualizations using forcats 
+ Design and implement more advanced plots
:::

### 📖 Required Reading: [R4DS 16: Factors](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/factors.html)

#### 📽 Optional Video: [forcats](https://www.youtube.com/embed/dAiSYli7tVg)

By the end of the reading, you should be able to answer the following questions:

::: {.callout-check-in}

TO-DO

:::
